input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('market.csv')
qids = ['388689', '398208', '666706', '739439', '512785', '724111']
for qid in qids:
    row = df[df['qid'].astype(str) == str(qid)]
    if len(row) > 0:
        r = row.iloc[0]
        print(f'=== Q{r[\"qid\"]} ===')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Market: {r[\"market_aggregate\"]}')
        print()
"
